## Description
Please include a summary of the requested changes and the related issue/feature. 

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New Skill (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] New Command (adds a verb-named command to `commands/`)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist:
- [ ] `SKILL.md` follows naming conventions (kebab-case, no suffixes).
- [ ] `evals/evals.json` exists with at least 3 test scenarios.
- [ ] Skill table updated in all 5 `INSTALL.md` files (if adding a new skill).
- [ ] `README.md` skills catalog updated (if adding a new skill).
- [ ] Version bumped in `config.json`, `hooks.json`, `plugin.json` files (if applicable).
